## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### UI Component DoD (if applicable - see [docs/ui-component-dod-checklist.md](docs/ui-component-dod-checklist.md))

- [ ] Functional spec met; edge cases handled
- [ ] Type-safe API; minimal props; forwardRef if needed
- [ ] A11y: keyboard complete, roles, labels, focus, contrast, RTL
- [ ] Visual: states, size/density, dark/light, motion reduced
- [ ] Tests: unit + a11y = 0 violations; visual regression where applicable

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG (if needed)
- [ ] I have added/updated JSDoc comments
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation in `/docs`

### Performance & Security

- [ ] I have considered the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] I have checked for potential security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not introduced any breaking changes (or documented them)
